label: Loguetown and Roger execution platform

atlas_anchor.source_ref: Hand-authored (Phase 3): placed to the belt model — East Blue is the lower-left quadrant (lng<0, lat<0); the Grand Line is the equator. Foosha is on Dawn Island (canon). NEEDS /admin/place refinement to fan standard.
atlas_anchor.warning: Never infer local bearings, distances, or topology from this deterministic atlas point.

atlas_anchor.source_ref: Hand-authored (Phase 3): placed to the belt model — East Blue is the lower-left quadrant (lng<0, lat<0); the Grand Line is the equator. Foosha is on Dawn Island (canon). NEEDS /admin/place refinement to fan standard.
atlas_anchor.warning: Never infer local bearings, distances, or topology from this deterministic atlas point.

topology.summary: Loguetown is a city landmark system whose central execution scaffold anchors both the chapter-one historical event and a later mirrored near-execution. The scaffold must remain individually addressable from the globe.

temporal_variants.state: Historical crowd and Roger execution tableau at the central platform.
Empty preserved scaffold within the active city.
Later event state with storm, crowd, and lightning.

event_scenes.state_delta: Historical crowd, scaffold occupancy, banners, and cinematic lighting activate.
event_scenes.camera_cue: Begin at city-street height, reveal the scaffold over the crowd, then isolate Roger against the sky.

event_scenes.state_delta: Mirrored execution staging switches to storm and lightning state.
event_scenes.camera_cue: Reuse the Roger composition with a different subject and violent weather to make the parallel legible.

chapter_logic.default_rule: Render the latest verified state whose reveal chapter is less than or equal to the reader chapter.
chapter_logic.unknown_gate_rule: Do not render a chapter_to_verify state until its exact gate is confirmed.

coordinate_policy.atlas_anchor: Use the app coordinate only to place or open the local scene on the globe.
coordinate_policy.local_topology: Build only from cited containment and relationship evidence. Never infer local bearings or distances from deterministic atlas jitter.
coordinate_policy.runtime: Use an expanded local inset, path graph, or moving entity transform when a single flat raster cannot express the place.

visual_program.master_scene: One Blender master scene with addressable collections for topology nodes, chapter states, event actors, atmosphere, and runtime LODs.
must_show: execution scaffold/tower as the city's central visual anchor
surrounding square and dense town fabric
separate historical, empty-landmark, and storm event variants
repeatable camera language connecting the two execution scenes
must_not_show: a generic town plate with no scaffold
Roger permanently present in free-roam mode
the later lightning event before its gate
visual_program.runtime_handoff: Export static environment and event-state collections separately; MapLibre controls anchor, visibility, route progress, and chapter gate.

unresolved: Exact chapter for Luffy's near-execution and lightning state.
Manga-accurate scaffold dimensions and square sightlines.
How many crowd agents remain legible at globe and inset LODs.
